foodServiceApplicability: Charlotte food service establishments need a grease trap or interceptor for grease-laden wastewater.
interceptorType: Charlotte Water treats grease trap and grease interceptor terms interchangeably in its policy.
pumpOutFrequency: Charlotte Water says the device must be properly maintained, cleaned by a grease hauler, and kept from causing sewer blockages or overflows.
manifestRequirement: Keep service records and hauling receipts with the business file so maintenance can be verified.
submissionMethod: Use Charlotte Water's FlowFree process and confirm the hauler against the current approved provider list.
enforcementNote: Missing maintenance records or blocked sewer lines can trigger follow-up from Charlotte Water.
